version_description: All lyrics with accompanying chords. Full chord legend included. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oqTq8gckf8E.
tuning: D G C F A D
content:
Song: With you I'm born again
Artist: Billy Preston and Syreeta
Composers: Carol Connors and David Shire
Album: Fast break
Tabbed by: DJ  5th Sept 2013

TV performance at this link:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oqTq8gckf8E

TIME SIGNATURE: 3/4 (Waltz time)

NOTE:  
I find this song much easier to play and sing in Em. If you want
to play it in the original recorded key of Dm then de-tune all guitar
strings down a full tone to D-G-C-F-A-d to match it.

Please IGNORE ANY POP-UP CHORD BOXES the website might automatically
suggest and use the typed shapes shown below:

[ch]Em[/ch]    = 022000   [ch]B7sus4[/ch] = x24252   [ch]Em7[/ch]    = 022030   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   = 113121
[ch]D6[/ch]    = xx0202   [ch]B7[/ch]     = x24242   [ch]Dm9[/ch]    = xx0210   [ch]C7sus4[/ch] = x35363
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch] = x32000   [ch]Esus4[/ch]  = 022200   [ch]Esus2[/ch]  = 024400   [ch]C7[/ch]     = x35353
[ch]B11[/ch]   = x22222   [ch]E[/ch]      = 022100   [ch]Fm[/ch]     = 133111   [ch]Fm7/Eb[/ch] = xx1111
[ch]Bm7[/ch]   = x24232   [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]  = xx3010   [ch]Cm7[/ch]    = x35343   [ch]Fsus4[/ch]  = 133311
[ch]Am7[/ch]   = x02010                     [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch] = x46564   [ch]F[/ch]      = 133211

Please take a second to just scroll down to the bottom of the page
and select a star rating for my tab, it would be much appreciated.
====================================================================

[Intro]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D6[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]B11[/ch]
|  /  /  /  |  /  /  /  |  /  /  /  |  /  /  /  |[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Come bring me your softness, comfort me through all this madness,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                         [ch]B7sus4[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]       [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Woman, don't you know, with you... I'm born a - gain?[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Come bring me your sweetness, now there's you there is no weakness,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]B7sus4[/ch]      [ch]B7[/ch]       [ch]Esus4[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Lying safe within your arms... I'm born a - gain![/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I was half, not whole, in step with none,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Dm9[/ch]
Reaching through this world, in need ...of ...one![/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Come show me your kindness,  in your arms I know I'll find this,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                         [ch]B7sus4[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em7/D[/ch]
Woman, don't you know, with you... I'm born a - gain--------?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]B7sus4[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]  [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Esus2[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Lying safe with you I'm born ...a - gain----! |  /  /  /  |  /  /  /  |[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Esus4[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Esus2[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
|  /  /  /  |  /  /  /  |  /  /  /  |  /  /  /  |[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Come bring me your softness, comfort me through all this madness,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                         [ch]B7sus4[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]       [ch]Esus4[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Woman, don't you know, with you... I'm born a - gain----?[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Come bring me your sweetness, now there's you there is no weakness,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]B7sus4[/ch]      [ch]B7[/ch]       [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Lying safe within your arms... I'm born a - gain------?[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I was half, not whole, in step with none,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Dm9[/ch]
Reaching through this world, in need... of... one![/tab]

[Chorus and Coda]
[tab]     [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Come show me your kindness,  in your arms I know I'll find this,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                        [ch]C7sus4[/ch]      [ch]C7[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Fm7/Eb[/ch]
Woman, don't you know, with you  ...I'm born a - gain--------?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]C7sus4[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]Fsus4[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
Lying safe with you I'm born ...a - gain--------![/tab]
